etapas.tutorial: The valve is not actuating. Check the pressure at the solenoid valve inlet.
Look for air leaks at the BSP/NPT connections of the aluminum/stainless steel block.
Use the proper tool to tighten the loose connection and stop the leak.
Pneumatic pressure has been restored and the valve is ready to operate.

tutorialInicial: Place the object on the surface to begin the problem solution.
popupInicialTexto1: Point your camera at a flat surface and wait for the white background to appear.
popupInicialTexto2: Once it appears, tap the screen to view the object.
